research.stage.understand.title: Understand the question
research.stage.understand.hint: Clarify the topic and research goal first.
research.stage.decompose.title: Decompose the topic
research.stage.decompose.hint: Split the question into searchable, learnable sub-topics.
research.stage.evidence.title: Gather evidence
research.stage.evidence.hint: Collect and organize evidence from the selected sources.
research.stage.result.title: Form the result
research.stage.result.hint: Compose the gathered evidence into the final output.

settingsTour.llm.title: 1 / 5 — LLM
settingsTour.llm.desc: Pick the active LLM profile, endpoint, and model used for chat and reasoning.
settingsTour.embedding.title: 2 / 5 — Embedding
settingsTour.embedding.desc: Configure the embedding provider and model used for knowledge retrieval.
settingsTour.search.title: 3 / 5 — Search
settingsTour.search.desc: Set an optional web-search provider and any related network settings.
settingsTour.saveTest.title: 4 / 5 — Save & Test
settingsTour.saveTest.desc: After editing, click Save Draft to persist your changes to the catalog. Then open Diagnostics below and Run Test to verify the connection works.
settingsTour.apply.title: 5 / 5 — Apply
settingsTour.apply.desc: Once the test passes, click Apply to write the active configuration into .env so 学习助理 starts using it immediately.
settings.configNote: Save Draft persists all profiles to model_catalog.json, which 学习助理 reads at runtime. Apply syncs the active profile into .env for CLI and non-UI compatibility. You can keep multiple profiles in the catalog and switch between them anytime.
